summary: Creates virtual shape on pg wires.
description: Creates virtual shape on pg wires.

options.name: -layers
options.description: {{virtual_layer, power_layer[mask_num]} ...} Specifies the layer pair which need create virtual shapes. mask ID is optional to select pg wires.

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the marker shapes name. Default, defLayerBlkName.

options.name: -pg_width_list
options.description: Specifies only create virtual shape on the pg pin which width be specified thru this option.

options.name: -pg_width_range
options.description: Specifies the pg width range which need virtual shapes . Default, all pg wires.
